节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module offers set wifi policies on the devices.
WAPI pre-shared key to be specified.
Microsoft challenge handshake authentication protocol version 2
Public Land Mobile Network of the provider of Passpoint credential
Sub ID of the SIM card
Wi-Fi SSID: the maximum length is 32
Hide SSID or not, false(default): not hide
Security type: reference definition of WifiSecurityType
The UID of the Wi-Fi profile creator
Random mac address, the length is 6

Gets state of whether the Wi-Fi is active. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@returns { boolean } true if Wi-Fi is active.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Sets the Wi-Fi profile. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { WifiProfile } profile - profile indicates the profile of Wi-Fi.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
profile indicates the profile of Wi-Fi.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Adds disallowed wifi list by {@link WifiAccessInfo} array. This function can be called by a super administrator. The size of the array after setting cannot be greater 200.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { Array<WifiAccessInfo> } list - an array of added Wi-Fi access information.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200010 - A conflict policy has been configured.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
an array of added Wi-Fi access information.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
A conflict policy has been configured.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Turn on wifi. This function can be called by a super administrator. If the admin is not empty, it must have the corresponding permission.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { boolean } isForce - True means force open wifi, user can not turn off it, false means user can turn off it.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 203 - This function is prohibited by enterprise management policies.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
True means force open wifi, user can not turn off it, false means user can turn off it.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
This function is prohibited by enterprise management policies.
